response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, his direct experience with production-grade AI solutions, RAG architectures, and vector databases is limited compared to the role's requirements. His leadership in technical discovery and mentorship is evident, but the depth of AI-specific expertise may require further validation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript and Node.js, relevant to cloud-based AI system integration.
Proven leadership in technical discovery, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., at re:cinq and Altom Consulting).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tools, demonstrating familiarity with emerging GenAI frameworks.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with production-grade AI solutions (8+ years required) or RAG architectures.
No direct mention of vector databases or LLM performance optimization in resume highlights.
Diverse but fragmented project history may dilute focus on core GenAI/cloud responsibilities.
